name: soloterm-agent-org-grok
description: Grok port of Skylence agent-org. Bundles Solo MCP server (board/PTY/timer) + the five role skills (orchestrator, planner, solo-worker, replacer, org-audit), capacity-check, build-slot, ghost-probe, capacity-probe. Includes session discipline hooks adapted for Grok lifecycle (org-lane-mark, org-stop-gate, org-conduct-refresh) with exact ${GROK_PLUGIN_ROOT} load-time paths. mcpServers points at the Solo stdio binary.
